feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: "Operations in SAP HANA/BWA" in tab "Runtime Properties" of BW query
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

    we have a SAP AO report, running on sap bw query (source from SAP HANA view). when set [0]No optimized operations in SAP HANA/no BWA for "Operations in SAP HANA/BWA" in tab "Runtime Properties" of the BW query. the data is correct.

    However, when set operation to other values, the report result is wrong.

    My question: why report result is not consistent by setting different operation values ?

entry.title: Any Note so that the External Equipment Type accepts the "Ñ" since it doesn't let us?
entry.content: We are creating teams with external number ranges from "AAAAA - ZZZZZZ" but we get to the 4th character of the letter "Ñ" and it does not let us advance because it gives us the error: IS045, where we have a different character, is there a note for Mexico?

entry.title: Fetch SAP HANA DB table data in ABAP using SQL Scripts
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to fetch data from HANA DB by calling SQL script from an ABAP program and send the result to the concerned person via email.

 

SELECT * FROM "SYS" . "USERS" WHERE USER_DEACTIVATED='FALSE'

 

This will be an automated process (Background job)

Please help with the code.

Thanks & Regards,
Nitin

#HANA DB, SQL

entry.title: Sap Hana rename
entry.content:
Hello, 

I recover Sap Hana server from backup and change hostname.

In /hana/data and /hana/log there is not .dat files since we exclude them in backup.

I try to rename system but I got errors.

When I perform this operation in last year I was able to rename system and recover SYSTEMDB.

Logs:
13:44:45.885 - INFO: Renaming instance...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Testing conversion of topology...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Updating /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/hostname01n/sapprofile.ini...
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Updating value 'SAPLOCALHOST' in section '' ('hostname01n' => 'hostname01nres')
13:44:45.896 - INFO: File '/hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/hostname01n/sapprofile.ini' updated
13:44:45.896 - INFO: Checking -convertTopology result...
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Switching to user id 1001 and group id 601.
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Starting external program /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/exe/hdbnsutil
13:44:45.962 - INFO: Command line is: /hana/shared/HRP/HDB90/exe/hdbnsutil -convertTopology --oldHost=hostname01n --newHost=hostname01nres --test
13:44:46.797 - INFO: Output line 1: nameserver hostname01nres:39001 not responding.
13:44:46.798 - INFO: Output line 2: Opening persistence ...
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 3: assign failed with persistence startup error. exception 1: no.3020151 (DataAccess/PageAccess/impl/DataVolumePartitionFiles.cpp:151) TID: 64328
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 4: No DataVolume files found in path "/hana/data/HRP/mnt00001/hdb00001/"
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 5: exception throw location:
13:44:46.834 - INFO: Output line 6: 1: 0x00007fff927188b0 in PageAccess::DataVolumePartitionImpl::init(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumePartitionInfo const&, bool
)+0x17e0 at DataVolumePartitionFiles.cpp:151 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 7: 2: 0x00007fff92723370 in PageAccess::DataVolumePartition::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumePar
titionInfo const&, bool, bool)+0x1b0 at DataVolumePartitionImpl.cpp:114 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 8: 3: 0x00007fff92733bb8 in PageAccess::DataVolumeImpl::addPartition(unsigned int, ltt::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<int, 64> > const&, bool, bool, bool)+0xe8 a
t DataVolumeImpl.cpp:464 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 9: 4: 0x00007fff92734c0c in PageAccess::DataVolumeSPI::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::PageIO const&, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumeInfo const&)+0x30c at DataVolumeImpl.cpp:434 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 10: 5: 0x00007fff926a5980 in PageAccess::PageIO::createInstance(ltt::allocator&, Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, Diagnose::StatisticsData const*, PageAccess::ExtendedDataVolumeInfo const&)+0x240 at PageIOImpl.cpp:766 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 11: 6: 0x00007fff92b5c2a0 in DataAccess::PersistenceManagerImpl::createInstance(ltt::refcounted_handle<DataAccess::PersistenceConfigurationSPI>&, bool, bool, bool)+0x1650 at PersistenceManagerImpl.cpp:1954 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 12: 7: 0x00007fff92b80180 in DataAccess::PersistenceManager::open(ltt::refcounted_handle<DataAccess::PersistenceConfiguration> const&, bool)+0xc0 at PersistenceManager.cpp:164 (libhdbdataaccess.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 13: 8: 0x00007fff958e9d48 in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceSystem::initialize(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo const&, bool, PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE)+0x788 at PersistenceSystem.cpp:456 (libhdbpersistence.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 14: 9: 0x00007fff95892bf8 in PersistenceLayer::PersistenceFactory::initPersistence(PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE, DataAccess::TransactionCallback*, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, ltt::refcounted_handle<TransactionManager::TransactionControlBlockFactory>&, bool, ltt::smartptr_handle<DataAccess::DisasterRecoverySecondaryCallback>&, bool)+0x6d8 at PersistenceFactory.cpp:463 (libhdbpersistence.so)
13:44:46.835 - INFO: Output line 15: 10: 0x00007fff8f086ad4 in PersistenceController::startup(PersistenceLayer::PERSISTENCE_MODE, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo*, bool, DataAccess::TablePreloadWriteCallback*, DataAccess::TablePreloadReadCallback*, Backup::RecoverCbc_Federation*)+0x1434 at PersistenceController.cpp:611 (libhdblogger.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 16: 11: 0x00007fff9c414268 in NameServer::Topology::startPersistence(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool) const+0x28 at Topology.cpp:280 (libhdbns.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 17: 12: 0x00007fff9c41bffc in NameServer::Topology::initPersistence(NameServer::ServiceStartInfo&, bool, bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError*, bool, ltt_adp::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<bool, true> >, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo::RequestAction)+0x3ac at Topology.cpp:393 (libhdbns.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 18: 13: 0x00007fff9c41d350 in NameServer::Topology::initPersistence(bool, bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError*, bool, ltt_adp::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<bool, true> >, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo::RequestAction)+0x250 at Topology.cpp:275 (libhdbns.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 19: 14: 0x0000000125c98538 in NameServerCmd::CommonHostAction::initPersistence(bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError*, ltt::smart_ptr<NameServer::Topology, ltt::integral_constant<bool, false>, ltt::integral_constant<bool, false> >, bool, ltt_adp::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<bool, true> >, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo::RequestAction)+0x78 at host.cpp:302 (hdbnsutil)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 20: 15: 0x0000000125bf04f4 in NameServerCmd::TopologyAttachGuard::initPersistence(bool, TREX_ERROR::TRexError*, bool, ltt_adp::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, ltt::integral_constant<bool, true> >, NameServer::ServiceStartInfo::RequestAction) [clone .constprop.0]+0xc4 at TopologyAttachGuard.h:57 (hdbnsutil)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 21: 16: 0x0000000125c32ffc in NameServerCmd::CmdActionConvertTopology::performCommand()+0x1fc at convertTopology.cpp:107 (hdbnsutil)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 22: 17: 0x0000000125be66c8 in main+0x998 at TopologyCmdAction.cpp:29 (hdbnsutil)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 23: 18: 0x00007fff90626fe0 in System::mainWrapper(int, char**, char**, void*)+0x50 at IsInMain.cpp:339 (libhdbbasis.so)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 24: 19: 0x00007fff8f346620 in generic_start_main.isra.0+0x140 (libc.so.6)
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 25: 20: 0x00007fff8f346834 in __libc_start_main+0xb4 (libc.so.6)

13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 28:
13:44:46.836 - INFO: Output line 29: exception type information:
13:44:46.837 - INFO: Output line 30: - 0: public ltt::exception@0x7fff9016f140
13:44:46.837 - INFO: Output line 31: stopping service...

13:44:46.837 - INFO: Output line 33: failed.
13:44:47.086 - INFO: Program terminated with exit code 1

entry.title: LOCATE Original User - Table BKPF: USNAM = SAP_WFRT and TCODE = MIRO
entry.content:
I need to create a report to provide AP performance, however most of the AP Invoice transactions is done by Workflow/Batch processing how do i find the original user to determine performance? 

I am using table BKPF but the only USNAM i find for Transaction TYPE KR is the workflow.

entry.title: HANA XSA Odata setup for consuming the XSA Calculation views
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My team is trying to set up "HANA XSA Odata for consuming the XSA Calculation views",

We are trying to do the same in the Webide. This API will be consumed by the middleware team for B2B consumption.

Please point me step by step on how to XSA Odata in Webide.

 

Thanks,

Shanthi

entry.title: Performance Optimization of Calculation Views
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When working with SAP HANA Calculation Views perfromance optimization, how do you figure out where the performance is slow or what is causing it? 

I am currently learning on this concept but always my question is, how do we actually know where the performance is poor? On what basis can we say that the performance of a calculation view is bad?

Thanks in advance for your suggestions!

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition 

Best Regards,

Vikram Kamvar

entry.title: China Golden Tax - FDEI Excel solution
entry.content:
We have Activated Business Functions and trying to use the FDEI solution within SAP. We use the Excel templates which is created in this process.

In here we also have some Badi's that we use to make sure to retrieve the correct data in the columns in the excel template delivered standard by SAP.

IDGTCN_OB_ADJUST_CONFIG

IDGTCN_OB_DATASET_PREP_AFT

IDGTCN_OB_OPR_DET_VALUE4TMPL

All this is working fine. However when we have the output (in English), we then replace English header with Chinese header, but it cannot be uploaded. And we receive message : “导入失败，导入模板已更新，请下载最新模板填写后重新上传”, English is “Import failed, import template has been updated, please download the latest template, fill it out and re-upload it” - The issue is that the template we get out of SAP is the same as the one we may download. Anyone in here using these excel templates and having the same issue ???

The in the inbound process - App: Upload Inbound Files - we do this manually and this works fine. However we want to update some additional fields that is not included in the inbound file from Government, but which we will take from the tabels  EIV_GTD_HDR – in here we have field DISC_AMOUNT and DISC_TAX_AMOUNT, which we would like to update in TXI_HDR field DISC_NET_AMOUNT and DISC_TAX_AMOUNT. However we can not find any Badi to use. Anyone in here have suggestions ?

entry.title: SAP VIM Analytics - Table Query
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know how can i access these tables of VIM to query data. I have tried Tables SWWLOGHIST/SWWUSERWI/SWWIHEAD but these dont seem to be the data im looking for.

Anybody know where i can find that information?

entry.title: how to open a connection from S4/HANA to other database
entry.content:
how to open a connection from S4/HANA to oracle.

we are in the process to setup s4/HANA and we need to be able:

  1.  to connect from s4/HANA to another database (oracle on premise)
  2. We need to connect from on premise oracle database to s4/HANA

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: KPI display error
entry.content: For some reason, the dashboard is not being shown to a user, despite installing Adobe Flash Player it is not working

entry.title: How to restrict access to specific cost centers in SAP S4 HANA
entry.content: Currently in SAP ECC there are display access restrictions to certain cost centers, now I need to know how to restrict access to specific cost centers in SAP S4 HANA. Is there any authorization object?

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues.

I prepare the reports, and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6 and 122  - count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

According to the documentation the functionality should be available: 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_em92/9.2/en-US/71/a972114577451aa29429183ba9b07f/frameset.htm

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 or 122 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME
entry.content:
our application have this error randomly when import a company schema. the flow we take is

ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME xxxx

1. create an empty schemaB

2. create an empty schemaB1

3. import sourceSchemaA."*" as BINARY from '/hana/dump/2024-09-03 14:00:53_sourceCompanyA_targetCompanyB with replace rename schema sourceSchemaA1 to schemaB1, sourceSchemaA to schemaB, globalSchemaA to globalSchemaB NO DEPENDENCIES

the import only happen once but still get this error.

What's the possible reason?

#Hana

entry.title: Can I add rows to an existing SAP HANA table from a python dataframe?
entry.content: hana_ml.dataframe.create_dataframe_from_pandas() allows me to create a new SAP HANA table from the data of a python dataframe. However if that HANA table already exists and contains data, I just want to add more rows to it. Is that also possible? Or do I have to create a temporary table via create_dataframe_from_pandas and then move the rows to the real table?

entry.title: Install HANA DP Agent on Linux, Error Segmentation fault (core dumped)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I installed HANA DP Agent on a Linux linux/amd64 (ubuntu:22.04) based docker image and get the following error when opening agentcli.sh:

 

dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ cd HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64/
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ ./hdbinst --silent --batch --path="/usr/sap/dataprovagent" --agent_listener_port=5050 --agent_admin_port=5051
SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent installation kit detected.


SAP HANA Lifecycle Management - dataprovagent Installation 2.7.5.0.0
********************************************************************


Checking installation...
Preparing package 'dataprovagent'...
Preparing package 'Installer'...
Installing SAP HANA Data Provisioning Agent to /usr/sap/dataprovagent...
Installing package 'dataprovagent'...
Installing package 'Installer'...
#####################################################################
IMPORTANT NOTE:
#####################################################################
You have installed Data Provisioning Agent with default settings. The default settings use insecure channel to communicate with HANA server. For secure communication, SSL settings must be configured via the Data Provisioning Agent Configuration tool after the installation is complete. Please see SAP HANA Smart Data Integration Installation and Configuration Guide for details on configuring SSL between the Agent and HANA server.
#####################################################################
Installation done
Log file written to '/var/tmp/hdb_dataprovagent_2024-09-24_08.27.13_23/hdbinst_dataprovagent.log' on host 'cf985f15681e'.
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64$ cd ..
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ls
DataAssurance                IMDB_DPAGENT200_07P_50-70002516.ZIP  SIGNATURE.SMF  adapters    artifacts.xml  camel          doc      dpagent.ini        dpproxy  features  krb5  log       p2       sapjvm  ssl  versions.txt  workspace
HANA_DP_AGENT_20_LIN_X86_64  LogReader                            Trigger        agentutils  bin            configuration  dpagent  dpagentconfig.ini  ds-lite  install   lib   manifest  plugins  sec     ui   webservice
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$ ./bin/agentcli.sh --configAgent 
./bin/agentcli.sh: 4: [[: not found
Configuring the Agent at the following location:
/usr/sap/dataprovagent

./bin/agentcli.sh: 15: [[: not found
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
dpagent@cf985f15681e:/usr/sap/dataprovagent$

 

Does anyone had the issue regarding "Segmentation fault (core dumped)"?

Thank you and best regards
Tim

// Logfile attached

entry.title: is there any APIs are available for HANA to Park the invoice?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is there any APIs are available for Parking the invoice

 

Thanks

entry.title: Get all tables mapped to an OBJECTCLASS in CDHDR
entry.content:
Dear all

I like to know a way to get all SAP ERP tables that get updated when an entry for a particular OBJECTCLASS is logged in CDHDR table. I see that there is an entry logged in CDHDR with OBJECTCLASS called "BELEG". I understood that this could mean several tables like BSEG, BKPF, BSID, BSAD have got documents updated within them.

I noticed that updates (Us) in SAP ERP are not getting logged in CDPOS table. So, I like to rely on CDHDR and get list of all tables that got updated for a particular UDATE & OBJECTCLASS. Using this, I will check if data is fresh in my target system (Databricks).

appreciate ideas/thoughts.

Br,

Noor.

entry.title: Scheduled Backup Failures on SAP HANA Tenant Database
entry.content:
We are encountering recurring issues with the scheduled daily data backup for one of our tenant databases,  on our SAP HANA server Our server hosts three tenant databases.

The above said database backup fails once or twice a week, and the failures occur under varying conditions:

  1. Stale PID Issue:
    • Sometimes the error log indicates that the backup process has stale PIDs.
    • Upon checking the PID file (located in /var/log/SAPBusinessOne/BackupService/logs/abc-hana_30015/XXX_LIVE.pid), we find multiple PIDs associated with the same schema.
    • Deleting the older PIDs resolves the issue, and the backup completes successfully after that.
  2. Backup Failure without Stale PID:
    • At other times, the backup fails without the stale PID issue. In these cases, the only solution we’ve found is to stop the HANA services and restart the operating system. Once restarted, the backupserver proceeds without issues.

what is the issue related for this and what actions should we follow to resolve the matter

I am eagerly seeking support from this esteemed community.

entry.title: Which way of S4 Hana system implementation is suggested, if client is new to SAP and or old to SAP?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Ref. to subject mentioned. can you through some light on it.!

Because, yesterday I have attended an interview for SAP Head position in Hyd in a product based company especially a Manufacturing industry, they were saying they are using sap from past 20 years (this is a bid wonder?), but the company is 30 years old. and recently 2 years ago they have to SAP S4 Hana system.

However still they are not happy, says that they have lot of gaps in their system after implementing SAP S4Hana, not sure, if they have implemented green field implementation (meaning from the scratch, need to build the organization into new S4 Hana ERP system, Fiori based).

And also said that, they have these concerns mentioning below: 

-1). People issue (might be their company people /business have not cooperated and or supported during migration)

-2). Data inputs have not given properly,

-3). Systems issues

feeling, all these because the work is not done properly in the first 3 phases of Activate methodology. Discover, Prepare and Explore phases were not fully utilized, meaning the activities and or task were not well taken care, is it not?

Otherwise, they have now still gaps, and the management were not happy, cause they reports or dash board are not meeting as per their expectation, due to that, management is not able to take proper decision and or they is a delay in that or lagging... resulting in that, they are not satisfied it seems. And they said that, it as implemented by a Pune based sap implementation partner.!

but one thing asked since they are old to sap 20 years, still their system is not fully stabilized.. so is it not because of something else, that is just influence of owners? because its a private limited company. One man army show, so feeling sap have developed a methodology to utilize and implement the new system for their industry for better way of digitization of their enterprise right?  And the results are as expected, provided when the companies follow better, and leverage all the best practices and implemented, right?

So, need your expert opinion, what might be the causes, best possible suggestions.!

Appreciate your expertise thoughts.!

Thanks in advance,

Regards.

Er.K.S.
